vocab.meaning: vấn đề về gu thẩm mỹ/sở thích cá nhân
vocab.example: Ultimately, whether you prefer a neon wrap or a classic black finish is purely a matter of taste.

vocab.meaning: thu hút sự chú ý/bắt mắt
vocab.example: Vibrant colors like scarlet or electric blue really catch the eye when you're cruising down the motorway.

vocab.meaning: trở nên nổi bật giữa đám đông
vocab.example: Choosing a custom pearlescent paint job is a surefire way to make your vehicle stand out from the crowd.

vocab.meaning: đáp ứng mọi tiêu chuẩn/yêu cầu
vocab.example: For me, a silver car ticks all the boxes because it’s both stylish and incredibly easy to keep clean.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường/kết hợp được ưu điểm của cả hai
vocab.example: A metallic grey finish offers the best of both worlds: it looks premium like black but hides dust as well as white.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu/không thể tách rời
vocab.example: Selecting the right shade is part and parcel of the car-buying experience for most enthusiasts.

vocab.meaning: mỗi người một ý/tùy sở thích mỗi người
vocab.example: I personally find pink cars a bit garish, but each to their own when it comes to self-expression.
If you want something off the beaten track, you might opt for a matte bronze or a deep emerald green.

vocab.meaning: tầm thường/không có gì đặc biệt (an toàn)
vocab.example: Most people stick to middle-of-the-road colors like white or silver to ensure they can sell the car easily later.
Repainting a car in a specialized multi-coat finish can cost a fortune, but it looks spectacular under the sun.
